question: Will the US attack Cuba in the next 30 days?
textDescription: Resolves YES if the US attacks Cuba before June 12, 2026. Resolves NO if no attack occurs before then.
newsKeyEvidence: U.S. officials state no imminent military action against Cuba despite President Trump's threats. | Cuban President Díaz-Canel warns of severe consequences if U.S. attacks. | U.S. intelligence community analyzing potential Cuban responses to military action. | Cuban authorities accuse U.S. of fabricating a case for military intervention. | U.S. intelligence community analyzing potential Cuban responses to military action.
